description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a distinctive angular design and a prominent folding or skeletonized stock. The main body is constructed from matte black metal and polymer, featuring a top-mounted Picatinny rail for accessory attachment. The magazine is a detachable box type, inserted at an angle in front of the trigger guard, and a vertical foregrip is present for improved handling. The barrel is short and robust, with no visible muzzle device attached. The rifle's ergonomic pistol grip and integrated trigger guard are designed for rapid deployment and ease of use in close-quarters urban environments. The overall finish is utilitarian, with minimal reflective surfaces and a focus on functionality.
description: A compact, angular black rifle with a folding stock, detachable box magazine, and short barrel, designed for urban use. Features include a Picatinny rail, vertical foregrip, and ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the folding stock, angled magazine, vertical foregrip, and Picatinny rail along the top.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile, barrel end, and alignment of the foregrip and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the folding stock, magazine, and overall compactness of the rifle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's structure and the top rail, with the barrel and foregrip visible in alignment.
